title: Thaumcraft: Return of the ancients
description: Addon for Thaumcraft that returns the ancient world from old versions of thaumcraft in a slightly modified form.
body:
Thaumcraft: Return of the ancients is an addon for Thaumcraft that returns the ancient world from old versions of thaumcraft in a slightly modified form.

---

The mod is in active development, everything that is in the mod at the moment will be reworked

---

Everything you need to know for gameplay is written in thaunomicon
The mod tab opens after researching 'Delving into the Eldritch', but you can get to the ancient world earlier (if you find a portal)

Brief description:
The mod adds a procedurally generated labyrinth created on the basis of old versions of Thaumcraft with traps, bosses and everything else, in the ancient world you can take items only from the thaumcraft and baubles mods, this can be configured in the configuration, the mod is quite complex and you will have to die there more than once, so after death the things will be saved and you will return to the normal world (this can be disabled in the configuration), but you will have to go through the labyrinth again, each attempt the labyrinth is generated anew, the load on the server is not large, if desired, you can configure the minimum number of players required to start generation
so far there is only one level and bosses from Thaumcraft 6, but in the future, several more levels and reworking of bosses are planned

More detailed information is on the wiki
  
---

I used Google Translate all complaints to it I have nothing to do with it fsavaykeemvkuykmpatsu

---

My e-mail - artur114projects@gmail.com

---

I would be glad if you report errors to me on Discord or GitHub, as I do not have the opportunity to conduct normal tests in multiplayer, this will help the development of the mod.
